commands: cp packages/paperlesspaper-web/.npmrc.nixpacks .railpack.npmrc && NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG=.railpack.npmrc yarn install --frozen-lockfile && PATH="/app/node_modules/.bin:/app/packages/paperlesspaper-web/node_modules/.bin:$PATH" yarn --cwd packages/paperlesspaper-web build:production && rm -f .railpack.npmrc

deploy.startCommand: PORT="${PORT:-3000}" && cd packages/paperlesspaper-web && yarn run preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port "$PORT"
